named_mapping_decisions.rationale: BuyerReference is the buyer-assigned business reference; it is never tenant_id.
Business-process context is repeatable and identifies business processes; it is never trace_id.
Only InvoiceKit's own application context parameter carries tenant_id, trace_id, and source_system.
